channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-07 17:52 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: (🧵1/11) For the past year and a half, I've been investigating OpenAI and Sam Altman for@NewYorker. W...
item.description: (🧵1/11) For the past year and a half, I've been investigating OpenAI and Sam Altman for@NewYorker. With my coauthor@andrewmarantz, I reviewed never-before-disclosed internal memos, obtained 200+ pages of documents related to a close colleague, including extensive private notes, and interviewed more than 100 people. OpenAI was founded on the premise that A.I. could be the most dangerous invention in human history—and that its C.E.O. would need to be a person of uncommon integrity. We lay out the most detailed account yet of why Altman was ousted out by board members and executives who came to believe he lacked that integrity, and ask: were they right to allege that he couldn't be trusted? A thread on some of of our findings:

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚀 LIVE FROM SPACE: President Donald J. Trump Calls Artemis II Astronauts After Breaking the Farthest...
item.description: 🚀 LIVE FROM SPACE: President Donald J. Trump Calls Artemis II Astronauts After Breaking the Farthest Distance Record in Human Spaceflight 🇺🇸 HISTORIC! "Your mission paves the way for America's return to the lunar surface very soon."

item.title: @elonmusk: The British government hid this data for years. Now it is out. 79% of everyone arrested for theft on...
item.description: The British government hid this data for years. Now it is out. 79% of everyone arrested for theft on British railways was a foreigner. 40% of all arrests. 37% of sexual offenses. 36% of violent crimes. All foreign nationals. They knew exactly what the consequences of their immigration policy were. They just never told you.

item.title: @elonmusk: Hasan Piker: "KiII the motherf*ckers. Let the streets soak in their red, capitalist bIood!" Democrat...
item.description: Hasan Piker: "KiII the motherf*ckers. Let the streets soak in their red, capitalist bIood!" Democrats are campaigning with him

item.title: @elonmusk: In the United States military, we leave no American behind.
item.description: In the United States military, we leave no American behind.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨@NASAAdminJared Isaacman had the PERFECT response to Trump’s proposed 2027 budget cutting $5.6 BILL...
item.description: 🚨@NASAAdminJared Isaacman had the PERFECT response to Trump’s proposed 2027 budget cutting $5.6 BILLION (23%) from NASA “I think the American public and the taxpayers should be judging NASA based on OUTCOMES and NOT how quickly we can spend money every year.” What a LEGEND. There’s PLENTY of waste to cut across the board, and Jared is the man to figure out what to cut.

item.title: @elonmusk: Intel is joining Terafab! Tesla,@xAIand@SpaceXare launching the most epic chip-building effort ever ...
item.description: Intel is joining Terafab! Tesla,@xAIand@SpaceXare launching the most epic chip-building effort ever – combining logic, memory & advanced packaging under one roofterafab.ai/
